[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001100110 4
1 0000011110 4
2 1101100001 5
3 1100101000 4
4 0011000000 2
5 1011011001 6
6 1110111111 9
7 1111111110 9
